accidental_fire.name: Accidental Fire
accidental_fire.description: A careless blaze guts workshops and homes before brigades contain it.

factory_fire.name: Factory Fire
factory_fire.description: Industrial plant burns, idling lines and scattering ash over the yard.

warehouse_fire.name: Warehouse Fire
warehouse_fire.description: Stored goods go up in smoke, jolting trade and local supply.

oil_spill.name: Oil Spill
oil_spill.description: Fuel slicks the coast, killing fish and staining the shoreline for seasons.

chemical_spill.name: Chemical Spill
chemical_spill.description: Industrial toxins leak into soil and water near plant yards.

dam_failure.name: Dam Failure
dam_failure.description: A reservoir wall fails, flooding valleys and wrecking water works.

power_outage.name: Power Outage
power_outage.description: The grid falters. Factories idle and services stumble in the dark.

bridge_collapse.name: Bridge Collapse
bridge_collapse.description: A key crossing fails, snarling freight and regional travel.

mining_accident.name: Mining Accident
mining_accident.description: A shaft disaster halts production and shakes mining communities.

overfishing_scandal.name: Overfishing Scandal
overfishing_scandal.description: Public outrage forces a hard throttle on coastal fleets.
